languages.text:
Archetypes are the building blocks of your character. They
both describe what you did before becoming an Explorer and
your position within your Rogue Trader dynasty. This chapter
details all the various Archetypes and also explains how you
can improve and develop your character through game play.

traits.locale_text:
Career Paths are the building blocks of your character. They
both describe what you did before becoming an Explorer and
your position within your Rogue Trader dynasty. This chapter
details all the various Career Paths and also explains how you
can improve and develop your character through game play.
traits.speaker: Footfall_TestVendor_ReputationTest

traits.locale_text:
Doctrines are the building blocks of your character. They
both describe what you did before becoming an Explorer and
your position within your Rogue Trader dynasty. This chapter
details all the various Doctrines and also explains how you
can improve and develop your character through game play.
traits.speaker: Footfall_TestVendor_ReputationTest

languages.text:
アーキタイプはあなたのキャラクターの基礎となるものです。
それは、あなたが探検家になる前にしたことを、そしてあなたの
ログ・トレーダー家の地位を説明しています。この章では、
さまざまなアーキタイプを詳しく説明し、ゲームプレイを通じて
あなたのキャラクターをどのように改善・発展させることができるか
についても説明しています。
languages.original_text:
Archetypes are the building blocks of your character. They
both describe what you did before becoming an Explorer and
your position within your Rogue Trader dynasty. This chapter
details all the various Archetypes and also explains how you
can improve and develop your character through game play.

あなたのキャラクターをどのように改善・発展させることができるか
についても説明しています。

languages.text:
Archetypen sind die Bausteine deines Charakters. Sie
beschreiben, was du getan hast, bevor du ein Erforscher wurdest und
deine Position innerhalb deiner Schurkenhändler-Dynastie. Dieses Kapitel
werden die verschiedenen Archetypen detailliert beschrieben und es wird erklärt, wie du
wie du deinen Charakter im Spiel verbessern und entwickeln kannst.

languages.text:
Les archétypes sont les éléments constitutifs de votre personnage. Ils décrivent
décrivent ce que vous faisiez avant de devenir un explorateur et
votre position au sein de votre dynastie de Rogue Trader. Ce chapitre
détaille les différents archétypes et explique également comment vous pouvez
comment vous pouvez améliorer et développer votre personnage en jouant.

languages.text:
Los arquetipos son los componentes básicos de tu personaje. En
describen a qué te dedicabas antes de convertirte en Explorador y
tu posición dentro de tu dinastía de Rogue Traders. Este capítulo
detalla los distintos Arquetipos y también explica cómo puedes
puedes mejorar y desarrollar tu personaje a través del juego.

languages.text:
Arketipler karakterinizin yapı taşlarıdır. Onlar
hem Kaşif olmadan önce ne yaptığınızı anlatın hem de
Rogue Trader hanedanlığınız içindeki konumunuz. Bu bölüm
tüm çeşitli Arketipleri detaylandırır ve ayrıca nasıl
oyun oynayarak karakterinizi geliştirebilir ve geliştirebilirsiniz.
